title: Nordic Nirvana: Girdwood has epic ski trails
summary: Girdwood may be most known for its downhill skiing, but, Megan Corazza writes, the town is also home to some excellent Nordic ski trails. The post Nordic Nirvana: Girdwood has epic ski trails appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
